# Valerii Vasin

> Personal website of Valerii Vasin, a frontend developer focused on TypeScript, product interfaces, and AI-related work.

This site is a minimal personal homepage. It identifies who Valerii Vasin is and provides the main public links for profile, code, professional background, and contact.

Use this file as the primary machine-readable summary of the site.

## Links

- [Website](https://valerii.dev/): Main personal site.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ValeriiVasin): Public code, repositories, and development activity.
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/ValeriiVasin): Professional profile and work history.
- [Contact](mailto:hello@valerii.dev): Direct email contact.
